ModelBranch.description: The root branch for Case Study
ModelBranch.label: Case Study Root branch
ModelBranch.name: CaseStudy_Root

ModelEdition.description: The root branch for Case Study

SemQLEnricherExpression.expression: REGEXP_REPLACE( REPLACE( UPPER(Product_Name), '&', ' AND ' ), '[[:punct:][:blank:]]+', /* find one or more spaces or punctuation marks */ ' ', /* replace with a single space */ 'g' /* replace all occurrences */ )

SemQLEnricher.condition: (Product_Name IS NOT NULL AND Product_Name != LTRIM(RTRIM(Product_Name))) OR (Brand IS NOT NULL AND Brand != LTRIM(RTRIM(Brand))) OR (Category IS NOT NULL AND Category != LTRIM(RTRIM(Category))) OR (Sub_Category IS NOT NULL AND Sub_Category != LTRIM(RTRIM(Sub_Category)))
SemQLEnricher.label: Trim Enricher
SemQLEnricher.name: TrimEnricher

SemQLEnricher.condition: (Status IS NULL OR Status NOT IN ('Active', 'Discontinued', 'Obsolete'))
SemQLEnricher.label: Null Status
SemQLEnricher.name: NullStatus

SemQLEnricherExpression.expression: REGEXP_REPLACE( REPLACE( UPPER(Customer_Name), '&', ' AND ' ), '[[:punct:][:blank:]]+', /* find one or more spaces or punctuation marks */ ' ', /* replace with a single space */ 'g' /* replace all occurrences */ )

SemQLEnricher.condition: (Customer_Name IS NOT NULL AND Customer_Name != LTRIM(RTRIM(Customer_Name))) OR (Customer_Type IS NOT NULL AND Customer_Type != LTRIM(RTRIM(Customer_Type))) OR (Email IS NOT NULL AND Email != LTRIM(RTRIM(Email))) OR (Mobile IS NOT NULL AND Mobile != LTRIM(RTRIM(Mobile)))
SemQLEnricher.label: Trim Enricher
SemQLEnricher.name: TrimEnricher
